template:
defmodule Solution do
  @doc """
  Pipes value through functions with error handling.
  Stops on first {:error, reason} and returns it.
  Wraps plain values as [[SLOT init_acc]].
  """
  def safe_pipe(value, functions) do
    [[SLOT reduce_kind]](functions, {:ok, value}, fn func, {:ok, acc} ->
      case func.(acc) do
        {:ok, result} -> [[SLOT ok_cont]]
        {:error, _reason} = error -> [[SLOT err_halt]]
        plain_value -> {:cont, {:ok, plain_value}}
      end
    end)
  end
end
prompt: Pick the reducer kind, the initial accumulator, and the cont/halt control values.
